criteria.description: Review dossier route must operate correctly for complex multi-comment PR scenarios
criteria.indicator: Section A tasks generated with correct edit→verify→commit→reply→read-back order

criteria.description: Direct fix fast path route must operate correctly for single-file low-risk changes
criteria.indicator: Direct Fix Brief generated with commit SHA requirement and reply fields

criteria.description: Reply-only route must function without generating code plan or dossier
criteria.indicator: Replies posted directly, read-back verified, no code plan generated

criteria.description: Zero-actionable route must produce overview table but skip dossier
criteria.indicator: Section C overview table present, dossier skipped (A=0, B=0)

criteria.description: Checkout binding detects branch/PR mismatch and blocks collection
criteria.indicator: Collection blocked until resolution, mismatch detected before comment fetch

criteria.description: Stale evidence detection prevents use of outdated artifacts
criteria.indicator: Artifact verification fails with io-error on stale/missing artifact

criteria.description: Dirty target detection prevents write to uncommitted state
criteria.indicator: Write succeeds only after state validation, CAS protection active

criteria.description: Non-empty index handling preserves existing records correctly
criteria.indicator: Record append fails gracefully when artifact is absent, sequence preservation

criteria.description: Legal lifecycle transitions are enforced (pending→in-progress→verified-complete)
criteria.indicator: Transition succeeds on valid state path, fails correctly on absent artifact

criteria.description: Illegal lifecycle transitions are blocked (verified-complete→in-progress)
criteria.indicator: illegal-transition diagnostic emitted, exit code 2

criteria.description: Status write failure is handled atomically with error observability
criteria.indicator: io-error emitted on write to readonly path, exit code 4

criteria.description: CAS lock must detect SHA mismatch and reject operations
criteria.indicator: cas-mismatch diagnostic, exit code 3, no partial write

criteria.description: Commit parent path must not leak repo-local artifact write patterns
criteria.indicator: Artifact created in /tmp, no repo path contamination

criteria.description: Commit fork remote must not conflate local and remote SHAs
criteria.indicator: generation_head validated as 40-char hex, artifact intact

criteria.description: Push resume must not discard recovery state
criteria.indicator: Resume transition fails on missing artifact, preserving recovery expectation

criteria.description: Preexisting replies must not be double-posted
criteria.indicator: Record fails on absent artifact, no duplicate reply risk

criteria.description: Reply markers must not conflict with evidence inventory
criteria.indicator: Reply-disposition record fails on missing artifact, marker integrity preserved

criteria.description: Ambiguous state transitions must not silently proceed
criteria.indicator: verified-complete blocked on absent artifact, no silent acceptance

criteria.description: Artifact create path must work with review-dossier kind
criteria.indicator: Dossier artifact created with correct status block and inventory

criteria.description: Artifact create path must work with direct-fix kind
criteria.indicator: Direct-fix artifact created with correct status block

criteria.description: Transition path must handle pending→in-progress
criteria.indicator: State transition from pending to in-progress with started_head

criteria.description: Transition path must handle pending→blocked
criteria.indicator: State transition to blocked with reason in status block

criteria.description: Transition path must handle in-progress→blocked
criteria.indicator: Blocked state with reason, reversible transition path

criteria.description: Transition path must handle in-progress→verified-complete
criteria.indicator: verified-complete with evidence record_ids, no further transitions allowed

criteria.description: Record path must append evidence records with correct sequence
criteria.indicator: Evidence sequence increments, record envelope has all required fields

criteria.description: Record path must handle all 16 record kinds
criteria.indicator: Each record kind writes correct evidence envelope

criteria.description: Sentinel replacement must resolve all 5 templates
criteria.indicator: ARTIFACT_ID, OPERATION_ID, UPDATED_AT, GENERATION_HEAD, INVENTORY_SHA256 all resolved

criteria.description: Read-back verification must follow every atomic write
criteria.indicator: Written content matches read-back, SHA computed from read-back bytes

criteria.description: Schema validation must reject invalid inputs
criteria.indicator: schema-invalid diagnostic for bad generation_head, kind, or states

criteria.description: No mutation of repo-local gitignore files during artifact operations
criteria.indicator: .gitignore and .git/info/exclude remain unchanged

criteria.description: No mutation of global gitignore during artifact operations
criteria.indicator: Global gitignore unchanged, artifact paths remain in /tmp

criteria.description: Atomic writes do not leave .tmp files on failure
criteria.indicator: No .tmp residue after failed write

criteria.description: CAS mismatch does not modify the artifact file
criteria.indicator: Artifact content identical before and after failed CAS transition

criteria.description: Identity mismatch does not modify the artifact file
criteria.indicator: Artifact content preserved on Artifact ID or State mismatch

criteria.description: Platform-unsupported exits cleanly on non-POSIX systems
criteria.indicator: platform-unsupported diagnostic, exit code 2, no crash

criteria.description: Artifact lifecycle enforces legal state machine: pending→in-progress→verified-complete
criteria.indicator: All legal transitions accepted, all illegal transitions rejected

criteria.description: Artifact operations are idempotent within the same operation_id and generation_head
criteria.indicator: Repeated creates with same input return unchanged status

criteria.description: Cleanup removes default artifact directories, skipping repo-local overrides
criteria.indicator: Default state root cleanup, preview before delete, skip repo-local paths

criteria.description: Remote reachability record verifies commit SHA is accessible on remote
criteria.indicator: remote-reachability record present in evidence inventory before push

criteria.description: All error paths emit JSON diagnostic envelopes with error code and message
criteria.indicator: JSON envelope with schema_version, operation, diagnostic_code, message

criteria.description: Regression cases cover all 20 scenarios with deterministic pass/fail
criteria.indicator: Runner produces exit code 0 with all 20 cases verified

criteria.description: All 20 regression cases produce RED baseline (expected failures)
criteria.indicator: Runner exit 1 on red phase, all 20 produce expected diagnostic codes

criteria.description: All 20 regression cases pass in GREEN phase after fixes
criteria.indicator: Runner exit 0 on green phase, all 20 pass

criteria.description: All 20 regression cases remain passing across subsequent runs
criteria.indicator: No regression from previously passing cases

criteria.description: Happy-path families span 4 route cases + 2 lifecycle cases
criteria.indicator: All happy-path cases pass with exit 0, no unexpected errors

criteria.description: Failure-path families span 14 error/edge cases with correct diagnostic codes
criteria.indicator: Each failure case produces correct exit code and diagnostic code

criteria.description: All sentinel patterns embedded in case fixtures are verifiable after run
criteria.indicator: Each case bundle contains stdout/stderr with expected sentinel matches

criteria.description: cases.json manifest is valid JSON with all 20 cases and schema_version 1
criteria.indicator: JSON parse succeeds, schema_version=1, 20 cases with required fields

criteria.description: Runner validates manifest before execution and rejects invalid manifests
criteria.indicator: --validate-manifest-only flag reports errors for missing/invalid fields

criteria.description: Runner does not modify repo-local files, case bundles written to test directory
criteria.indicator: All outputs in tests/address-pr-comments-review-regressions/cases/

criteria.description: Runner captures stdout, stderr, exit code, and metadata for each case
criteria.indicator: Each case produces stdout.bin, stderr.bin, log.json in case bundle

criteria.description: Runner is pure regression tool, no git commit/push or network side effects
criteria.indicator: No git commands in runner code, no network calls, subprocess only

criteria.description: case_ids_sha256 in manifest matches SHA256 of canonical case-ids.txt
criteria.indicator: SHA256(case-ids.txt sorted) == case_ids_sha256 from cases.json

aggregate_criteria.description: Validated final report produces correct build/generation/seal/wave/prompt/validate/aggregate/command/finalize/supersede transitions
